body:
Hi Amara, just wanted to give you a quick update before our call later this week — we closed our pre-seed round last month and [GreenPulse](companies/greenpulse) is still operating under our original co-founder structure, with myself as CEO and Priya holding the CTO role. We've made solid progress on our grid-edge monitoring stack and are now processing data from over 40 distributed sites across the Southwest. Given [Halfway Capital](firms/halfway-capital)'s focus on climate infrastructure, I think the timing is right to have a more serious conversation about what a seed round could look like for us. Would love to get 30 minutes on the calendar if you're open to it.

— Dev
